name: claude-os
description: A macOS activity monitor for Claude sessions — real-time token economics, context window health, and GC state tracking.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/server build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/desktop typecheck
